title: A first trailer has been revealed for season 3 of Shangri-La Frontier!
content: The anime will begin broadcasting in January 2027 (Studio: C2C).

title: Mushoku Tensei
content: Season 3 of Mushoku Tensei is listed with at least 14 episodes!

title: BREAKING
content: The live-action film adaptation of Darwin's Game has just been announced!
